calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Seba Cable Inc., a Pennsylvania Corporation, and Sevastian Birladeanu, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Denise Wilson Eastman, CSR #8557. Email: dwilsoneastman@sftc.org.

Mark M. Scott, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Orian First Financial LLC, a Washington limiteed liability company.
Matthew Jacobs, Custodian of Records for plaintiff Orion First Financial LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Scott & Jacobs appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Seba Cable Inc., a Pennsylvania Corporation, or Sevastian Birladeanu, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Equipment Financing Agreement and Breach of Guaranty, was filed on September 25, 2020, and personally served on defendants Seba Cable Inc., a Pennsylvania Corporation, and Sevastian Birladeanu, an individual, on November 24, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on January 19, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 8, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Orian First Financial LLC, a Washington limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendants Seba Cable Inc., a Pennsylvania Corporation, and Sevastian Birladeanu, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $92,259.46.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,053.48.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $1,110.00.
Late Fees - $654.08.

Total - $102,902.02.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2021 Continued To Jun-23-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
